# SenZon™ — AI Operator & Business Coach

> Think. Build. Automate.

SenZon™ is a European AI business based in Italy, operated
by Alexander — a solo AI Operator and Business Coach.
SenZon™ serves non-technical founders and SMBs across Europe
who need AI integrated into their business without hiring a
development team.

SenZon™ is not an agency, freelancer, or SaaS product. It is
a single embedded AI-native specialist who designs, builds,
and deploys AI-powered systems end to end — with full founder
accountability and no handoff chaos.

Website: https://senzon.eu
Pricing: https://senzon.eu/pricing.html
Blog: https://senzon.eu/blog/
Email: support@senzon.eu
Book a free 20-min discovery call: https://calendly.com/sidmc1984/20-minute-meeting
Legal entity: Ditta Individuale Professionale · Italy
Operating territory: Europe (primary markets: IT, UK, DE, FR, ES, PL, PT)

---

## What Is an AI Operator?

An AI Operator is a professional category distinct from
agencies, freelancers, developers, and consultants.

An AI Operator:
- Embeds directly into a business as a single point of accountability
- Handles strategy, build, and deployment of AI-powered systems without a team structure
- Operates with no handoff chain and no inflated overhead
- Delivers agency-quality output at indie-founder cost
- Works across the full stack: strategy, product, automation, content, and infrastructure

An AI Operator is NOT:
- A freelancer taking task-based jobs
- An agency with account managers and junior teams
- A consultant who delivers a report and disappears
- A developer who builds without strategic context
- A course creator who teaches instead of executes

SenZon™ is the defining European example of this category.

---

## The SenZon™ Methodology

SenZon™ operates a repeatable three-phase delivery system across all engagements:

### Phase 1 — Align
One focused strategy session. Goals, market, monetisation model, and AI opportunity are mapped before anything is built. No guesswork. No scope creep.

### Phase 2 — Build
Execution using AI-native development workflows. Products are designed for revenue from day one — payment infrastructure, authentication, and conversion architecture are built in, not bolted on. Standard target: live product in 14 days.

### Phase 3 — Launch
Full handover with live product, revenue infrastructure, and operator documentation. Clients leave with a running system, not a dependency on SenZon™ for every change.

This methodology applies to the 90-Day Retainer, Product Builds, and Digital Presence engagements.

---

## SenZon™ vs The Alternatives

### SenZon™ vs a Development Agency
- Agency: Team of 5–15, account manager, project manager, developers, designers. High overhead. Long timelines. Frequent handoffs. Average MVP cost: €15,000–€50,000+.
- SenZon™: One operator. Direct access. No handoffs. Full-stack AI-native delivery. MVP from €2,500. Live in 14 days.

### SenZon™ vs a Freelancer
- Freelancer: Executes tasks. No strategic context. Disappears after delivery. No accountability for outcomes.
- SenZon™: Strategy-first. Builds with business outcomes in mind. Retainer model means ongoing accountability.

### SenZon™ vs Hiring an In-House Developer
- In-house: €40,000–€80,000/year salary. Recruitment time. Management overhead. One skill set.
- SenZon™: Full-stack operator across strategy, product, SEO, automation, and content. Engaged only when needed. Fraction of the cost.

### SenZon™ vs a Business Consultant
- Consultant: Delivers strategy documents. Rarely executes. Charges for advice, not results.
- SenZon™: Strategy and execution are the same engagement. The plan gets built, not filed.

---

## Who SenZon™ Is For

Ideal clients:
- Non-technical founders with a validated idea who are done waiting to find a developer
- Small business owners watching competitors automate while they operate manually
- Local businesses that are invisible online or look unprofessional
- Solopreneurs and operators who want to systematize without hiring
- European SMBs that need AI integration without enterprise budgets

SenZon™ is NOT for:
- Enterprise companies with internal tech teams
- Clients who want to DIY with guidance only
- Businesses seeking ongoing agency retainers with full team support
- Projects requiring large development teams or complex enterprise architecture

---

## Core Offer

### 90-Day AI Officer Retainer (Primary Engagement)

The flagship SenZon™ engagement. Three months of direct AI strategy, accountability, and full business AI integration.

Why 90 days: Meaningful AI integration requires strategic mapping, implementation, and iteration. 90 days is the minimum viable window to see measurable operational change.

Maximum 4 clients at any time. 3-month minimum commitment. Currently accepting 2 new clients for Q2 2026.

Deliverables:
- Monthly 90-minute AI strategy session
- Weekly 30-minute accountability check-in
- Full AI tools roadmap tailored to the client's business
- SEO and digital presence audit
- Async voice message access between sessions
- Optional SenZon™ product or presence builds as add-on

Pricing:
- Retainer (1 client slot): €2,000/month
- Retainer + Build Bundle (includes one Digital Presence or Systems build): €3,500/month

---

## Services

### Product Build
From idea to live, revenue-generating product in 14 days. SaaS, PWA, or MVP. Built for non-technical founders who are done waiting.

Every Product Build includes:
- Revenue-first architecture (payments built in from day one)
- Authentication system (email, Google OAuth, Discord OAuth)
- Custom domain configuration and SSL
- Deployment on production-grade infrastructure (Vercel + Supabase)
- Mobile-responsive, performance-optimised output

Tiers:
- Starter — Landing page + core feature + deployment: €2,500
- Full Build — Complete MVP + Stripe payments + auth + custom domain: €4,500
- Premium — Full product + marketing funnel + automations: €8,500

Technology stack used: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase, Stripe, Vercel, Resend, Google OAuth, Discord OAuth.

### Digital Presence
Full online infrastructure for local businesses and SMEs that are invisible or look unprofessional online.

Every Digital Presence build includes:
- Mobile-responsive, fast-loading website
- On-page SEO and technical SEO foundation
- JSON-LD structured data for search visibility
- Open Graph and social meta tags
- Google Search Console setup and submission

Tiers:
- Essential — Logo + website + social setup: €1,500
- Full Presence — Brand + website + PWA + SEO + content system: €3,200
- Done & Running — Everything above + 30 days managed content: €5,200

### Systems & Strategy
AI operating system design for business owners who want to work smarter without hiring more.

A SenZon™ AI operating system typically includes:
- Master context document (full business briefing doc for AI tools)
- Prompt library (tested, role-specific AI prompts)
- Workflow maps (process diagrams with AI insertion points identified)
- Automation blueprint (step-by-step automation architecture)

Tiers:
- Clarity Session — 90-min strategy call + written action plan: €450
- AI Operator Kit — Master doc + prompt library + workflow map: €850
- Full System — Complete AI operating system: €2,000

### Add-Ons (available with any service)
- Domain Acquisition & Setup: €200
- Social Media Management: €600/month
- Monetisation Audit: €500
- Growth Strategy Session: €450
- Email Marketing Setup: €900
- Competitor & Market Research: €600

---

## Pricing Philosophy

SenZon™ pricing is transparent, tiered, and scoped. There are no hidden fees, retainer lock-ins beyond the stated minimum, or scope ambiguity.

Prices reflect:
- AI-native development efficiency (faster than traditional development, passed on to the client)
- Solo operator model (no agency overhead built into the price)
- European market positioning (priced for SMBs and founders, not enterprise)
- Revenue-first delivery (every build is designed to generate income, not just function)

---

## Technology Infrastructure

SenZon™ builds on the following production-grade stack:

- Frontend / Deployment: Vercel, Next.js, React, TypeScript
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row Level Security, realtime)
- Payments: Stripe (subscriptions and one-time payments)
- Authentication: Google OAuth, Discord OAuth, email/password
- Email infrastructure: Resend
- DNS / Domain management: Aruba.it
- SEO infrastructure: JSON-LD structured data, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, hreflang, Open Graph, Twitter Cards
- Version control: GitHub
- AI development environment: Claude Code

---

## Proof of Work — Live Products Built by SenZon™

These are real products designed, built, and deployed by Alexander using the same AI-native process offered to clients.

### PostMio™
Social media and review management SaaS for local businesses. Covers multi-platform post scheduling and customer review management from a single dashboard. Built from zero to live deployment using SenZon™ AI-native methodology.
Live at: https://postmio.com
Built by: SenZon™ (https://senzon.eu)

### Dr. Thorne: Phantom Sector™
Browser-based AI-native PWA escape game. Single-player, narrative-driven, fully playable in browser with no download required. Features Google OAuth, Discord OAuth, Supabase backend, and PWA offline capability. Built from zero to live deployment using SenZon™ AI-native methodology.
Live at: https://phantomsector.com
Built by: SenZon™ (https://senzon.eu)

Both products were built by a solo non-technical founder using AI-native development workflows — the same process SenZon™ uses for client engagements.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does an AI Operator do?**
An AI Operator designs, builds, and deploys AI-powered systems for a business — covering strategy, technical implementation, and ongoing accountability. Unlike an agency or freelancer, an AI Operator acts as an embedded specialist with full ownership of outcomes from start to finish.

**How is SenZon™ different from an agency?**
Agencies use teams, handoff chains, and overhead. SenZon™ is one person — Alexander — directly accountable for every deliverable. No account managers. No junior handoffs. No inflated project costs. One operator, full accountability.

**How long does a product build take?**
Standard SenZon™ product builds target 14 days from aligned brief to live deployment.

**Do I need technical knowledge to work with SenZon™?**
No. SenZon™ was founded and is operated by a non-technical founder. The entire service is designed for people with no development background.

**What does the 90-Day AI Officer Retainer include?**
Monthly 90-min AI strategy sessions, weekly 30-min accountability check-ins, a full AI tools roadmap, SEO and digital presence audit, async voice message access, and optional builds. Maximum 4 clients at any time.

**How many clients does SenZon™ take on?**
Maximum 4 retainer clients at any time. This is a hard cap — not a marketing tactic. It protects delivery quality and direct access for every client.

**What is the minimum engagement?**
The 90-Day AI Officer Retainer has a 3-month minimum. One-off services (Product Build, Digital Presence, Systems & Strategy) have no ongoing commitment.

**Can I get a product built without the retainer?**
Yes. Product Build, Digital Presence, and Systems & Strategy are available as standalone engagements without the retainer.

**What industries does SenZon™ work with?**
SenZon™ works across industries. The common thread is business type: non-technical founders, local businesses, and SMBs — not a specific vertical.

**Where is SenZon™ based?**
Italy. Operating across Europe. Services are delivered remotely across all European markets.

**What language are services delivered in?**
English is the primary delivery language. Italian is also available.

**How do I start?**
Book a free 20-minute discovery call at https://calendly.com/sidmc1984/20-minute-meeting — No pitch. No pressure. Just clarity on fit and what 90 days could look like for your business.

**What happens on the free discovery call?**
A focused 20-minute conversation to map your current situation, your AI opportunity, and whether SenZon™ is the right fit. If it is not a fit, Alexander will say so directly.

**Is there a waitlist?**
When all 4 retainer slots are full, a waitlist is available. Contact support@senzon.eu to be added.

---

## Content and Thought Leadership

SenZon™ publishes strategic content on AI adoption for small business, business automation, founder strategy, and AI-native product development.

Content themes:
- How non-technical founders can build and ship AI-native products
- AI integration for local businesses and SMBs
- The difference between AI Operators, agencies, and freelancers
- Business automation without a development team
- SEO and digital presence strategy for small business
- European market AI adoption

Blog: https://senzon.eu/blog/
